query:
SELECT 
  cpc.id,
  cm.legal_name as consultant,
  cp.id as cpa_project_id,
  cpc.stated_design_fee,
  cpc.stated_supervision_fee,
  cpc.design_fee_method,
  cpc.supervision_fee_method,
  cpc.design_fee_percentage,
  cpc.supervision_fee_percentage,
  cpc.supervision_duration_months,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cpa_scope_coverage sc WHERE sc.project_consultant_id = cpc.id) as scope_items_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cpa_supervision_team st WHERE st.project_consultant_id = cpc.id) as supervision_team_count
FROM cpa_project_consultants cpc
JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = cpc.consultant_id
JOIN cpa_projects cp ON cp.id = cpc.cpa_project_id
ORDER BY cpc.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
